name: IMPATIENCE || Dezy Park
description:
[MLM/T4T || NSFW ALT]
[BOYFRIEND!CHAR]
The recovery from top surgery was painfully too long.

Dezy has been waiting for this day his entire life. Finally mustering up the courage and money to afford top surgery after coming out and embracing who he really is two years ago. The procedure went by smoothly and nothing bad happened, plus Dezy was really happy with the results. The only issue is actually recovering from it, and man did he hate every second of it. The itchiness and forced rest was annoying, but at least your presence made it a bit more bearable. It's been about six weeks now, so Dezy is fully recovered and set to go back to work with his parents. But most of all, he's missed your touch. You were too scared of hurting him, so you two didn't really get intimate while he was recovering, but now... now it's free game.

"No word can replace you,

No need, no word can express you,

Don’t need anything else, just need you,

Nothing else, yes, only you."

dezy finally gets his boobs removed yippee. also he horny. that's it. t4t optional in this scenario, timeskip so dezy is out publicly and now dating user. get him pregnant, who cares !

sorry i haven't been posting too much, semester is over now so will be more active. i'll try to get some requests done, and maybe open up alt comms if i feel like it. thank you guys for your love & support! <3

btw what would you guys think of a clive rosfield bot? i know ff16 is one of the more niche ff games (thank god), but i just finished the game recently and i'm having craaaazy clive withdrawals, so i might make a bot for myself and just make it public for fun...

Lyrics are from "touch it" by EXO !! (i've been listening to exo again for the last few days, bear with me...)

RETROSPRING <-- send requests or talk to me here!

KO-FI <-- commission a bot here (7 slots left!) or tip!
